content:
# Session 150 ‚Äî review of iter-150

## Session metadata

- **Session / iter**: 150
- **Date**: 2026-05-19
- **Model**: claude-opus-4-7
- **Sorry count before**: 9 declarations using `sorry` across 5 files
  (`ChartAlgebra.lean` 2, `ChartAlgebraS3.lean` 4, `GrpObj.lean` 0,
  `Jacobian.lean` 2, `RigidityKbar.lean` 1).
- **Sorry count after**: **9 declarations** using `sorry` (unchanged
  NET ‚Äî see Per-target outcome). Per-file at iter-150 close:
  - `ChartAlgebra.lean` ‚Äî **2** (KDM L256 + hPI L473; sorry sites at
    L388 and L617 respectively).
  - `ChartAlgebraS3.lean` ‚Äî **4** ((S3.sep.1) L180; (S3.pi.1) L243;
    (S3.sep.2) L324; (S3.pi.2) L389; sorry sites at L199, L276, L342,
    L403 respectively).
  - `GrpObj.lean` ‚Äî 0.
  - `Jacobian.lean` ‚Äî 2.
  - `RigidityKbar.lean` ‚Äî 1.
- **Targets attempted** (iter-150 in-scope per planner): KDM (BR.5)
  joint-kernel collapse (Lane 2); (S3.sep.1) + (S3.sep.2) via HYBRID
  part (B) CharZero collapse (Lane 1).
- **Targets NOT attempted** (planner HYBRID-DEFERRED): (S3.pi.1),
  (S3.pi.2), hPI branch of `constants_integral_over_base_field` ‚Äî all
  gated on the HYBRID part (A) `[IsAlgClosed kbar]` user-input
  question.
- **Aggregate prover duration**: 1657 s (~27.6 min) across both lanes.
- **Substantive code delta** (per `attempts_raw.jsonl`: 16 edits / 1
  goal check / 16 diagnostic checks / 0 builds via LSP / 75 lemma
  searches):
  - `ChartAlgebra.lean`: **508 ‚Üí 702 LOC** (+194; ~100 doc-comment +
    ~90 helper proofs + ~30 body extension).
  - `ChartAlgebraS3.lean`: **+~90 LOC** (4 docstring updates + new
    helper lemma `Algebra.IsSeparable.of_finite_of_perfectField` at
    file end).

## Per-target outcomes

### Lane 2 ‚Äî `ChartAlgebra.lean`

#### KDM (BR.5) `KaehlerDifferential.mem_range_algebraMap_of_D_eq_zero` (L256) ‚Äî **PARTIAL**

**Approach** (HYBRID part (C) per
`analogies/h1cotangent-vanishing-iter150.md` ¬ß "Top suggestion (C)"):

1. **FREE-CASE**: in `CharZero`, `D f = 0` on `MvPolynomial œÉ k`
   implies `f ‚àà MvPolynomial.C.range`.
2. **Extract `SubmersivePresentation`** from
   `Algebra.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension n k B` to get a
   surjective algebra map `œÄ : P.Ring ‚Üí B` with
   `P.Ring = MvPolynomial Œπ k`.
3. **Lift `b` to `bTilde`** via
   `Algebra.Generators.algebraMap_surjective`; functoriality
   (`KaehlerDifferential.map_D`) translates `D_B b = 0` into
   `D_A bTilde ‚àà ker(map)`.
4. **Modify `bTilde` to absorb kernel elements** and apply FREE-CASE.

**Result**: Steps (1)‚Äì(3) CLOSED sorry-free; step (4) **transfer
step** deferred to iter-151+.

**Substantive lemma landed** ‚Äî the FREE-CASE pderiv coefficient
formula

```lean
private lemma _mvPoly_coeff_pderiv_at_shifted (i : œÉ) (u : œÉ ‚Üí‚ÇÄ ‚Ñï)
    (hui : 1 ‚â§ u i) (f : MvPolynomial œÉ k) :
    coeff (u - Finsupp.single i 1) (pderiv i f) =
      coeff u f * (u i : k)
```

is the substantive new content. NOT in Mathlib. Closed via support
analysis + `Finsupp.sub_single` case-bashing (~40 LOC), with the
auxiliary `_finsupp_sub_single_eq_of_one_le` (~16 LOC) handling the
uniqueness step. The result composes with
`KaehlerDifferential.mvPolynomialBasis_repr_apply` (bridges `D f = 0`
to `‚àÄ i, pderiv i f = 0`) to give
`_mvPoly_mem_range_C_of_D_eq_zero` ‚Äî the FREE-CASE joint-kernel
collapse ‚Äî closed sorry-free in ~10 LOC after the coefficient formula.

**Diagnostic-trail highlights** (per `attempts_raw.jsonl`):

- Initial body draft used `push_neg at hxi; interval_cases (x i); simp`
  for the `x i = 0` branch ‚Äî `lean_diagnostic_messages` flagged
  `push_neg` as deprecated. Replaced with
  `have hxi' : x i = 0 := Nat.lt_one_iff.mp (Nat.not_le.mp hxi);
  rw [hxi']; simp`.
- A `by_contra h; push_neg at h` block for "‚àÉ i, s i ‚âÝ 0" caused
  `unsolved goals case neg` with `(x - fun‚ÇÄ | i => 1) = u - ‚Ä¶` residual.
  Replaced with explicit `by_contra h; apply hne; ext j; by_contra hj;
  exact h ‚ü®j, hj‚ü©`.
- `Finset.sum_eq_single u` case `hxsub : x - Finsupp.single i 1 =
  u - Finsupp.single i 1` produced an unsolved sub-goal until the
  helper `_finsupp_sub_single_eq_of_one_le` was introduced to absurd
  the `hxne : x ‚âÝ u` from `hxsub` under `1 ‚â§ x i ‚àß 1 ‚â§ u i`.
- Final diagnostic at log_line 237 confirmed
  `{KDM L256, hPI L473}` as the only two sorries; no errors; clean
  build.

**Remaining transfer step** (the residual structured `sorry` at
ChartAlgebra.lean:L388):

Given `D_A bTilde ‚àà ker (map k k P.Ring B)`, construct `Œ± ‚àà P.Ring`
with `algebraMap P.Ring B Œ± = b` (preserves œÄ-image) AND `D_A Œ± = 0`
(unlocks FREE-CASE). By `KaehlerDifferential.ker_map_of_surjective`,
the kernel is the `P.Ring`-submodule of `Œ©[P.Ring‚ÅÑk]` generated by
`{D_A r : r ‚àà I}` plus `I ¬∑ Œ©[P.Ring‚ÅÑk]`. Leibniz on lifted relations
absorbs the `D(I)` part by modifying `bTilde` to `bTilde - ‚àë a_j r_j`.
The residual `I ¬∑ Œ©` part needs either:

- (S5.a) ~30 LOC of explicit `Submodule.map` / `Finsupp.linearCombination`
  unfolding to chase the `I¬∑Œ©` modifier away (Leibniz iteration OR
  free structure of `Œ©[P.Ring‚ÅÑk]` via
  `KaehlerDifferential.mvPolynomialBasis`).
- (S5.b) `Algebra.FormallySmooth.subsingleton_h1Cotangent` for an
  abstract H1-vanishing bypass.

Neither fits the iter-150 HYBRID (C) ~60‚Äì80 LOC budget.

**Dead ends explored** (confirmed inapplicable):

- `Differential.ContainConstants`: handles single-derivation kernel
  only, not joint kernel.
- `Subsingleton (Œ©[B‚ÅÑk])`: only in relative dimension 0.
- `Algebra.FormallyUnramified` ‚áí `Œ© = 0`: B is FormallySmooth, NOT
  FormallyUnramified (positive relative dimension).
- Direct `ker D = C.range` Mathlib lemma for general polynomial
  rings: does not exist (only
  `KaehlerDifferential.subsingleton_of_surjective` for surjective
  algebraMap, not our case).

#### `constants_integral_over_base_field` ‚Äî hPI branch (sorry at L617) ‚Äî **BLOCKED (planner-deferred)**

Off-limits this iter per PROGRESS.md: the hPI branch consumes
(S3.pi.1) + (S3.pi.2), both HYBRID-DEFERRED pending the user-gated
[IsAlgClosed kbar] HYBRID part (A) decision. 5-step base-change
closure chain remains documented in-line.

### Lane 1 ‚Äî `ChartAlgebraS3.lean`

#### (S3.sep.1) `isGeometricallyReduced_Gamma_of_smooth` (L180) ‚Äî **PARTIAL**

**Approach**: HYBRID part (B) CharZero collapse per planner directive.
Add `[CharZero k]` ‚áí `PerfectField` via `PerfectField.ofCharZero` ‚áí
route smooth ‚áí formally smooth ‚áí `PerfectField k` + `IsReduced` ‚áí
`IsGeometricallyReduced k Œì`.

**Result**: FAILED at **two distinct points**:

1. **Consumer compatibility**:
   `constants_integral_over_base_field` (`ChartAlgebra.lean:L431`)
   invokes (S3.sep.1) WITHOUT `[CharZero k]` in scope. Signature
   inflation breaks the consumer's (b.1) branch with
   `failed to synthesize instance of type class PerfectField k`.
   Verified by editing signature + `lake build`.
2. **Mathlib gap**: Even with `[PerfectField k]` in scope, the
   bridge `Algebra.IsSeparable k F` ‚áí
   `Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced k F` is NOT a Mathlib instance in
   `b80f227` (despite being mathematically true). Mathlib snapshot
   has only the forward direction
   `Algebra.instIsReducedTensorProductOfIsAlgebraicOfIsGeometricallyReduced`
   (IsGeometricallyReduced ‚áí IsReduced (K ‚äó A) for algebraic K).

**Status**: signature reverted to iter-149 form; body remains
structured `sorry` at L199. Docstring updated with iter-150 status
notes documenting both blockers.

**Iter-151+ continuation route**: per
`analogies/h1cotangent-vanishing-iter150.md` ¬ß "Top suggestion",
**DROP (S3.sep.1) from M2.a critical path entirely**; consumer's
(b.1) branch closes directly via `PerfectField + IsAlgebraic ‚áí
IsSeparable` without the geometrically-reduced intermediate, once
`[CharZero k]` propagates through `constants_integral_over_base_field`.

#### (S3.sep.2) `Algebra.IsSeparable.of_isGeometricallyReduced_of_finite` (L324) ‚Äî **PARTIAL**

**Approach**: HYBRID part (B) CharZero collapse. Add `[PerfectField k]`
to signature (subsumed by `[CharZero k]` via
`PerfectField.ofCharZero` automatic instance); discharge via
`Algebra.IsAlgebraic.isSeparable_of_perfectField`.

**Result**: PARTIAL ‚Äî **local 3-line closure verified working** in
isolation (`Algebra.IsAlgebraic.isSeparable_of_perfectField` ‚úì), BUT
breaks consumer at `ChartAlgebra.lean:L457` with
`synthInstanceFailed: failed to synthesize instance of type class
PerfectField k`.

**Status**: signature reverted to iter-149 form; body remains
structured `sorry` at L342.

**Forward-progress infrastructure landed**: new helper lemma
`Algebra.IsSeparable.of_finite_of_perfectField` (L435, body L441),
closed sorry-free, ~3 LOC:

```lean
theorem _root_.Algebra.IsSeparable.of_finite_of_perfectField
    (k F : Type u) [Field k] [Field F] [Algebra k F]
    [FiniteDimensional k F] [PerfectField k] :
    Algebra.IsSeparable k F :=
  Algebra.IsAlgebraic.isSeparable_of_perfectField
```

This is the iter-150 HYBRID part (B) CharZero collapse realised as a
parallel lemma with stronger hypotheses. Iter-151+ wiring path:
consumer-side update in `ChartAlgebra.lean` to propagate
`[CharZero k]` through `constants_integral_over_base_field`; then the
(b.1) branch closes in ~5 LOC by replacing the
`IsSeparable.of_isGeometricallyReduced_of_finite k _` call at L457
with `IsSeparable.of_finite_of_perfectField k _`.

#### (S3.pi.1) `Gamma_baseChange_iso_tensor_of_proper` (L243) ‚Äî **HYBRID-DEFERRED**

No attempt ‚Äî planner-deferred indefinitely pending user-gate.
Docstring updated with `HYBRID-DEFERRED` prefix.

#### (S3.pi.2) `Algebra.IsPurelyInseparable.of_unique_minPrime_baseChange` (L389) ‚Äî **HYBRID-DEFERRED**

No attempt ‚Äî planner-deferred indefinitely pending user-gate.
Docstring updated with `HYBRID-DEFERRED` prefix.

## Key findings / patterns discovered

### NEW Pattern ‚Äî MvPolynomial pderiv coefficient formula at shifted monomial

`coeff (u - Finsupp.single i 1) (pderiv i f) = coeff u f * (u i : k)`
for `u i ‚â• 1`. NOT in Mathlib. Proof goes by `MvPolynomial.as_sum`
+ `pderiv_monomial` + `Finset.sum_eq_single`; the singled-out summand
uses a finsupp-subtraction case-bash (helper
`_finsupp_sub_single_eq_of_one_le`). Reusable for any
joint-kernel-collapse or `pderiv`-via-monomials computation.

### NEW Pattern ‚Äî `_mvPoly_mem_range_C_of_D_eq_zero` (joint-kernel collapse for `MvPolynomial œÉ k` in `CharZero`)

Closed via `mvPolynomialBasis_repr_apply` reducing to `‚àÄ i, pderiv i f
= 0`, then the FREE-CASE joint-kernel collapse via the pderiv
coefficient formula. ~10 LOC of body + the helper machinery. The
FREE-CASE result is what HYBRID part (C) was after; the transfer
step to a general standard-smooth `B` is what remains.

### NEW Pattern ‚Äî HYBRID-part-(B) consumer-compatibility blocker

When a planner directive recommends inflating a signature to add
`[CharZero k]` / `[PerfectField k]` for a CharZero-collapse closure,
verify the **consumer call sites** can supply the typeclass BEFORE
committing the inflation. The iter-150 instance: (S3.sep.\*) inflated
to `[PerfectField k]` closed locally in ~3 LOC each, but the
consumer `constants_integral_over_base_field` is in scope with only
`[Field k]` (not `[CharZero k]` and certainly not `[PerfectField k]`).
The clean fix is to propagate `[CharZero k]` through the consumer
first; the iter-150 lane could not commit this because it would
cascade upstream to `rigidity_over_kbar` and downstream consumers.

### NEW Anti-pattern ‚Äî `Algebra.IsSeparable k F ‚áí Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced k F` direction is NOT in Mathlib b80f227

Despite being mathematically true for finite separable field
extensions (`F ‚äó \bar k` splits as `‚àè \bar k`), Mathlib b80f227 has
only the forward direction
(`Algebra.instIsReducedTensorProductOfIsAlgebraicOfIsGeometricallyReduced`).
Do NOT search for the reverse direction as a Mathlib instance ‚Äî it
is genuinely a Mathlib-PR-grade gap. Add to "Known Blockers" so future
iters do not waste cycles on a Mathlib search that will return empty.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)

- `RigidityKbar.tex`, `lem:S3_pi_1_Gamma_baseChange_iso_tensor_of_proper`:
  added `% NOTE (iter-150 review)` block disclosing the HYBRID part (A)
  user-gated descope disposition (Lean docstring carries
  `HYBRID-DEFERRED`).
- `RigidityKbar.tex`, `lem:S3_pi_2_isPurelyInseparable_of_unique_minPrime_baseChange`:
  added `% NOTE (iter-150 review)` block mirroring the (S3.pi.1)
  HYBRID-DEFERRED disposition.
- `RigidityKbar.tex`, `lem:KaehlerDifferential_mem_range_algebraMap_of_D_eq_zero`:
  added `% NOTE (iter-150 review)` block documenting the iter-150
  Lane 2 prover pivot from the (BR.1)‚Äì(BR.5) `Differential.ContainConstants`
  recipe to the HYBRID part (C) MvPolynomial-side joint-kernel-collapse +
  SubmersivePresentation lift + `KaehlerDifferential.map_D` functoriality
  reduction route. The note enumerates (C.a)‚Äì(C.e) and the (S5.a)/(S5.b)
  iter-151+ paths for the transfer-step residual. Addresses the
  must-fix-this-iter blueprint adequacy failure from
  `lean-vs-blueprint-checker-chartalgebra-iter150`.
- `AlgebraicJacobian_Cotangent_ChartAlgebraS3.tex` (pointer chapter):
  appended `% NOTE (iter-150 review)` block (a) flagging the three
  stale Stacks Tag references in the bullet list (`0334`/`0BJF`/`05DH`
  ‚Üí `035U+04QM`/`0BUG`/`030K`) as iter-151+ writer-cleanup debt with
  pointer to `references/stacks-*.md`; (b) recording the iter-150
  HYBRID part (A) user-gate disposition that descopes (S3.pi.\*)
  conditionally; (c) noting the new helper
  `Algebra.IsSeparable.of_finite_of_perfectField` and its iter-151+
  wiring plan.

No `\leanok` adds or removes. No `\mathlibok` adds (no new
Mathlib-aliased declarations landed this iter). No
`\lean{...}` rename corrections (the iter-150 prover lane did not
rename any blueprint-anchored declaration). No stale `\notready`
strips (none remained after iter-149).

## Recommendations for the next session

See `recommendations.md`.

## Review subagent dispatches

Two review subagents were dispatched this phase per the highly-
recommended discipline (both `.lean` files received prover edits this
iter; the prior iter-149 review skipped both with documented
rationale "iter-150 plan-phase is the natural re-dispatch point"):

- **`lean-auditor-iter150`**: whole-project audit.
- **`lean-vs-blueprint-checker-chartalgebra-iter150`**:
  `ChartAlgebra.lean` ‚Üî `RigidityKbar.tex`.
- **`lean-vs-blueprint-checker-chartalgebras3-iter150`**:
  `ChartAlgebraS3.lean` ‚Üî `AlgebraicJacobian_Cotangent_ChartAlgebraS3.tex`.

Reports archived to `logs/iter-150/`. Findings absorbed into
`recommendations.md` per severity.

## Blueprint doctor

The deterministic blueprint-doctor (`logs/iter-150/blueprint-doctor.md`)
reports **no structural findings** this iter: every chapter is
`\input`'d by `content.tex`, every `\ref{...}` / `\uses{...}` resolves
to a defined `\label{...}`, every annotation has a non-empty argument,
and no `axiom` declarations are present under the project's `.lean`
files. The iter-150 plan-phase `blueprint-writer-render-fix-iter150`
dispatch cleared the iter-149 render-issue backlog cleanly.

## Notes

- `meta.json` confirms `planValidate.status: ok / objectives: 2`,
  both prover lanes `prover.status: done`. Iter-150 prover ran
  parallel-mode.
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` summary shows 0 builds via LSP (per the file
  summary's `"builds": 0`); the prover lanes used
  `lake build` directly (per task results) instead of the LSP
  `lean_build` tool. Diagnostic checks (16) provided the per-iteration
  verification.
- Two prover lanes reported "lake build clean" with the expected
  sorry warnings (2 in ChartAlgebra.lean + 4 in ChartAlgebraS3.lean).
- No protected-signature violations; no new axioms introduced.
